TDP.simple_explain: How much heat the part makes, and roughly how much electricity it uses. A higher TDP means you need a better cooler and a bigger power supply.

Socket.simple_explain: The physical slot on the motherboard where the processor goes. An AMD processor will not physically fit into an Intel socket!

DDR5.simple_explain: The newest, fastest type of memory. Make sure your motherboard explicitly says it supports DDR5, as DDR4 sticks will not fit.
